artifact_summary: Page 2 of the GFECP –DMI 50 form detailing SLBE participation requirements, including work segmentation, bonding assistance, and recruitment protocols.
artifact_blurb: This section of the GFECP –DMI 50 compliance form (Page 2) mandates specific actions for Small Local Business Enterprise (SLBE) engagement. Bidders must confirm adherence to work segmentation strategies, provide evidence of bonding assistance, and outline recruitment efforts via designated checkboxes, attaching all requisite supporting documentation to validate compliance.
